articles.title: Trump criticises European allies over lack of support during war on Iran
articles.summary: Trump criticises European allies over lack of support during war on Iran US President Donald Trump has criticised several European allies for what he described as a lack of support during the US-Israeli war on Iran. Speaking alongside NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte in the Oval Office, Trump said the US did not require assistance but would have welcomed stronger backing from European governments. articles.title: Trump casts doubt on US responsibility for deadly Iran school strike
articles.summary: Trump casts doubt on US responsibility for deadly Iran school strike US President Donald Trump has said he has seen no evidence suggesting the United States was responsible for the missile strike that hit an Iranian primary school on 28 February, the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran. Speaking to reporters, Trump described the incident as "horrible" but said: "I've seen nothing to lead me to believe it was us." Brent crude drops below $75 for first time since war on Iran
articles.summary: Brent crude drops below $75 for first time since war on Iran Brent crude, the global oil benchmark, has fallen below $75 a barrel for the first time since before the US-Israeli war on Iran began. The benchmark was trading at $74.80 per barrel at 12:34 GMT on Wednesday, according to Bloomberg. The drop marks the first time Brent has traded below $75 since 27 February, the day before the outbreak of the war, according to Reuters, as markets continue to respond positively to progress in negotiations between Washington and Tehran.

US embassy in Kuwait resumes operations after wartime suspension
articles.summary: US embassy in Kuwait resumes operations after wartime suspension The US embassy in Kuwait has resumed operations after services were suspended following Iranian attacks earlier this year, a US state department spokesperson has said. The embassy will immediately restart emergency services for US citizens, while other consular services will be restored in phases, the spokesperson said. The state department suspended operations at its embassies in Kuwait and Saudi Arabia after Iranian drones targeted the diplomatic missions following the outbreak of the US-Israeli war on Iran.
